title: Map & Locations
summary: Regions, landmarks, and traversal notes for the Omni world.
intro: This placeholder article shows how location data can be grouped into regions now and later split into separate entries as the world map becomes more detailed.
facts: The current regions are intentionally generic so the layout can be tested before final naming is complete.
Location pages usually benefit from short travel notes, encounter hooks, and unlock requirements.
The URL slug for this entry is map-locations.

sections.heading: Outer Rim
paragraphs: The Outer Rim is framed as the rough edge of the playable space, where players first learn the rhythm of exploration, scavenging, and short narrative discoveries.
items: Best for onboarding traversal and light danger.
Can introduce environmental storytelling before heavier plot scenes.
Good place for simple collectibles and route shortcuts.

sections.heading: Flooded Pass
paragraphs: The Flooded Pass is a placeholder landmark for terrain challenges. It suggests weather, blocked routes, and tool-gated progress without needing final production art yet.
items: Potential hazard: unstable footing or shifting water level.
Potential reward: hidden path back to camp.
Potential story beat: first clear sign of a larger threat.

sections.heading: Observation Tower
paragraphs: The Observation Tower acts as a late-stop landmark in this draft layout. It works well as a reveal point for quests, fast-travel unlocks, or a panoramic story beat.
items: Ideal spot for map updates or journal discoveries.
Could contain binocular, radio, or beacon mechanics.
Fits both exploration rewards and narrative transitions.
